items.title: [DC] morimensstaff06@🔸礼包码┊gift-codes: **🎁 DC 56000守密人入驻达成礼 ┊ Discord 56,000 Keepers Milestone Reward**  《忘却前夜》官方Discor
items.summary:
**🎁 DC 56000守密人入驻达成礼 ┊ Discord 56,000 Keepers Milestone Reward**

《忘却前夜》官方Discord现有超过56000位守密人入驻啦🎉！感谢每一位守密人的喜爱与陪伴，请复制下方兑换码到「设置」→「账户」→「兑换码」处领取礼包吧~

🔹 兑换码：`HJVA-RLMF-RELF`
🔹 礼包内容：银芯×500、无垢之芯×5
🔹 有效期至

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

The Morimens Official Discord has reached 56,000 Keepers🎉! Thank you to every Keeper for your love and support along the way. To claim your gift, simply copy the redemption code below and head to [Settings] → [Account] → [Redemption Code].

🔹 Redemption Code: `HJVA-RLMF-RELF`
🔹 Gift Contents: Silver ×500, Pure Core ×5
🔹 Valid until: 

@everyone

items.title: [DC] that_one_chippy@🔸art-and-memes: In celebration of me actively logging in for 1 year, I had made this quick art!
items.summary:
In celebration of me actively logging in for 1 year, I had made this quick art!

While I had first played when Daffodil first released... I had stopped playing shortly after until the second anniversary. I never stopped thinking about the game, and I don't regret coming back 🐈  Thank you all for this amazing journey, and especially thank you for supporting my silly arts!

May the silver key guide us! ~~Now give me some cat food!~~
[附件: cat.png]
items.author: that_one_chippy

items.title: [DC] morimensstaff06@🔸官方素材┊official-materials: 感谢各位守密人的支持！《忘却前夜》新OST已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。 如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用。
items.summary:
感谢各位守密人的支持！《忘却前夜》新OST已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用。

**忘却前夜OST丨庞托斯EP·无休的凯旋**
愚蠢的、肤浅的、自高自大的、外强中干的离群者建立了自己的国。
一成不变的空壳们不会吐露出真话，因为没有什么，能从沟壑里重新拼凑起那颗过于害怕变化，以至于过早破碎的心。

✦ 曲：F.R.K. / B.I.A.V. Studio
✦ 企划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens new OST was released today. Welcome everyone to listen, download and share.
If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

**Morimens OST┊Pontos EP: The Unending Triumph**
Foolish, shallow, vainglorious, solitary—the brittle despot has forged a kingdom of his own.
Immutable shells breathe no truth; for nothing can piece together, from the ravine, a heart too afraid of change—and so shattered before its time.    

✦ Composer: F.R.K. / B.I.A.V. Studio
✦ Planning: B.I.A.V. Studio
[附件: 580580.png]
  └ morimensstaff06:
items.author: morimensstaff06

items.title: [DC] that_one_chippy@🔸同人创作: 為了慶祝我持續登入這款遊戲滿一年，我畫了這幅速寫！  雖然我是在 达芙黛尔剛推出時第一次玩這款遊戲…… 不久之後，我就停止遊玩了，直到遊戲推出兩週年為止。我從未
items.summary:
為了慶祝我持續登入這款遊戲滿一年，我畫了這幅速寫！

雖然我是在 达芙黛尔剛推出時第一次玩這款遊戲…… 不久之後，我就停止遊玩了，直到遊戲推出兩週年為止。我從未停止過思考那場比賽，而且我不後悔回來🐈 感謝大家陪伴我走過這段精彩的旅程，特別要感謝大家支持我這些傻氣的藝術創作！

願這把銀鑰引領我們！~~現在快給我一點貓糧！~~
[附件: cat.png]
items.author: that_one_chippy
